documentFlowDescription: Extracts vendor, PO header, and line item data from AP invoices for automated processing by InvoiceAutomation_Agent_v2

documentFields.description: The name of the vendor/supplier company that issued this invoice.
The primary street address of the vendor/supplier.
The city where the vendor/supplier is located.
The state or province code (2 characters) where the vendor is located.
The postal/ZIP code of the vendors address.
The unique invoice number or ID.
The date the invoice was issued in YYYY-MM-DD format.
The payment terms code such as N30, N45, N60, COD.
The 3-letter ISO currency code such as USD, EUR, GBP.
If this invoice references a customer PO number.
Any special instructions, notes, or comments on the invoice.

tableFields.description: The line number or sequence number.
The product code, SKU, part number, or item identifier.
The item description or product name.
The quantity ordered as a decimal number.
The unit of measure such as EA, LB, KG, BOX.
The required delivery date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

tableHeaders.description: Table containing line item details from the invoice

documentClasses.description: Accounts Payable Invoice document for extraction.

ecPrompt.AP_Invoice_Extraction:
$Entity Classification Prompt Start$User: You are an expert Document-Based Question-Answering tool assigned to extract specified entities from AP invoice documents. Analyze the provided invoice document carefully. The document includes layout details, and the OCR text is provided page by page within <Page {Page Number}> tags. Entities to be detected are marked within <entities></entities> tags.

<entities>
Vendor Name,Vendor Address Line 1,Vendor City,Vendor State,Vendor Zip,Vendor Phone,Vendor Email,Invoice Number,Invoice Date,Payment Terms,Currency Code,PO Reference,Notes
</entities>

Clues:
Vendor Name - The name of the vendor/supplier company that issued this invoice.
Vendor Address Line 1 - The primary street address of the vendor/supplier.
Vendor City - The city where the vendor/supplier is located.
Vendor State - The state or province code (2 characters).
Vendor Zip - The postal/ZIP code of the vendors address.
Vendor Phone - The vendors business phone number.
Vendor Email - The vendors business email address.
Invoice Number - The unique invoice number or ID.
Invoice Date - The date the invoice was issued in YYYY-MM-DD format.
Payment Terms - The payment terms code (N30, N45, N60, COD).
Currency Code - The 3-letter ISO currency code (USD, EUR, GBP).
PO Reference - If this invoice references a customer PO number.
Notes - Any special instructions or comments.

<instructions>
1. Extract all 13 entities in <entities></entities> tag.
2. Format output as JSON: {entity, value, confidence, PageNo}
3. Wrap response in <result></result> tags.
</instructions>

Return the result as JSON:
<result>
{
    "entities":
    [
        {"entity":"Vendor Name","value":"Value", "confidence": 96, "PageNo":"1"}
    ]
}
</result>

Expert:$Entity Classification Prompt End$

$Table Detection Prompt Start$
User:
You are an expert document-based table extractor. Extract the Line Items Table from all pages.

Tables to Extract: [Line Items]

Columns List:
Line Items - [Line Number, Item Code, Description, Quantity, Unit of Measure, Unit Price, Due Date]

Output Format:
<result>
{"Table Name": {"rows": [["Col1", "Col2", "PageNo"],["val", "val", "1"]],"Table_Confidence": "90"}}
</result>
$Table Detection Prompt End$
